UC38S1: The administer is presented with two lists of NDC codes/names.
The administrator chooses a drug from each list to record an interaction between the two drugs [E1].
The two drugs and a textual description of the possible effects of the interaction are stored.
UC38S2: The administrator selects one drug and is presented with a listing of all drug interactions with that drug.
The administrator can select a particular pair of drugs and delete the interaction between the two drugs.
